headline: Trane Technologies Extends Data Center Reach With LiquidStack Cooling Deal
summary: Trane Technologies (NYSE:TT) has completed its acquisition of LiquidStack, a company focused on advanced cooling solutions for data centers. The deal adds LiquidStack's immersion cooling and related technologies to Trane's portfolio for high density computing and mission critical facilities. The acquisition is intended to support sustainable cooling approaches for workloads such as AI computing and large scale data processing. For you as an investor, this move sits at the crossroads of two...
